label: dog
groundingNote: an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; many of them live with people, in the places where people live; when something happens near it, it does something, people can hear this from far; many people feel something good toward them, they feel something good toward people
notes: Animal kind; barking rendered as audible-doing (no onomatopoeia in the controlled lexicon).
